final_prompt.prompt:
Generate an original, non-infringing editorial photo of a Korean café-style coffee and dessert spread, styled for Instagram smartphone photography.

Style/medium: smartphone photography aesthetic, Instagram story style, light editorial with hand-drawn annotation overlay, Korean café lifestyle vibe
Composition: overhead flat-lay shot at 45-degree angle, smartphone lens perspective, shallow depth of field with soft bokeh
Subject: iced latte in clear glass with visible layers, flaky croissant on ceramic plate, small macarons, minimalist tableware
Scene/backdrop: warm-toned wooden table surface, soft café interior blurred in background, natural window light
Lighting/mood: soft diffused daylight from window, warm and inviting, cozy afternoon atmosphere
Color palette: warm browns and creams as base, soft pastel accents from macarons, natural wood tones
Materials/textures: visible coffee foam texture, flaky pastry layers, glossy ceramic glaze, matte paper napkin
Text (verbatim): "しあわせすぎる～" "さっぱり" "しっとり" "最高" "リラックス" "いい時間" "やさしい甘み"
Constraints: hand-drawn white line annotations with rough, uneven single-stroke style; contour lines tracing object edges; arrows and dashed lines for visual guidance; Japanese handwritten text (70% hiragana, 30% simple kanji); short diary-style comments; decorative elements: steam, sparkles, hearts, small emoticons with intentional negative space; no people in frame
Avoid: over-decorated clutter, perfect geometric lines, digital-looking annotations, watermark, 8K stuffer aesthetic, stock photo sterility
